creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your pr submission and support of FreeBSD.

it is very important that patches be attached to the PR.
This is important for a lot of reasons, but the most important one is 
that we have an audit log of submissions.
A year down the road (or 1 month), and if someone wanted to see exactly 
what was submitted, and your link disappeared, we would not have that in 
the logs.

Can you update your pr and add an attachment to this pr?


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
